implementation_scope: project summary, seven-step flow, recent project, quick links
enabled_actions: navigation; create/open project if existing runtime supports it

implementation_scope: source cards for local/GEO/TCGA/GTEx and source registration boundary
enabled_actions: source card navigation; existing source registration actions if already available
disabled_actions: TCGA+GTEx auto merge; direct analysis run

implementation_scope: file recognition, readiness table, blocker/warning rows
enabled_actions: view/copy readiness; run preflight if existing runtime supports it

implementation_scope: group assignment, comparison setup, covariate audit, design warnings
disabled_actions: persistent save; multifactor DEG; Cox modeling
implementation_blocker: storage adapter and covariate boundary copy required

implementation_scope: gated task cards for DEG, ORA/GSEA, KM, Cox, clinical audit
enabled_actions: open preflight panels; developer diagnostics if explicit
disabled_actions: formal DEG; formal ORA/GSEA; KM/log-rank; Cox; clinical conclusion
implementation_blocker: state/action gate carry-over required before any formal action
next_stage: UI-C2b gate carry-over audit then visual implementation

implementation_scope: result browser, semantic chips, report draft preview
state_model: feature.status.testing; resultSemanticKey from result registry or testing_level
enabled_actions: view testing/imported/preflight entries; copy draft text
disabled_actions: fake plots; formal report generation; report-ready package
implementation_blocker: split from Report Export and carry result semantic contract

implementation_scope: export gate status, disabled export actions, package readiness explanation
result_report_export_gate: resultSemanticKey mirrors selected result; reportStatusKey=draft; exportGate=disabled_missing_report_ready
implementation_blocker: report-ready gate and file/export adapter missing

implementation_scope: resource status, external dependencies, diagnostics link
disabled_actions: install/update/cloud config unless existing safe gate exists
implementation_blocker: resource install/update policy must stay user-triggered

implementation_scope: developer diagnostics, logs, technical artifact paths
implementation_blocker: must stay diagnostic and not normal user workflow
